title: Pickup Animations
description: Adds a subtle, satisfying animation when picking up items in your inventory.
body:
![Pickup Animations](https://github.com/Additional-Mods/pickupanimations/blob/main/mod_page_assets/title.png?raw=true)
---
A small, client-side QOL mod that adds a subtle pickup animation when you pick up an item in your inventory (or any other GUI).  
That's all.

---

![](https://github.com/Additional-Mods/pickupanimations/blob/main/mod_page_assets/showcase.gif?raw=true)

---

Want it on older Minecraft versions? Check out [Tiny Item Animations](https://modrinth.com/project/wMkevcSR)!  
This mod was _heavily_ inspired by it. Sadly it seems to be no longer maintained.

---

[![](https://github.com/Additional-Mods/additionaladditions/blob/main/mod_page_assets/bisect.png?raw=true)](https://bisect.dqu.one/)
